ext_weather.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 7am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 7am and 2pm. Cloudy, with a high near 86. Southwest wind 0 to 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
